title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
description: The system's vulnerability to denial-of-service (DoS) attacks is heightened due to the lack of information about its architecture and security controls. An attacker could flood the system with requests or inject malicious data that consumes excessive resources, leading to service outages.
affected_component: Web Server, Database Server, Network Infrastructure
attack_vector: Injection of large or complex data, overwhelming the server with requests, or exploiting vulnerabilities in the application code to consume excessive resources.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single source.
Employ input validation to prevent the injection of malicious data.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic and mitigate DDoS attacks.
